member.name: T:Origam.BI.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.BI.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.BI.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.BI.Strings.DefinitionNotInModel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Report definition not found in the model..

member.name: P:Origam.BI.Strings.OnlyXmlDocSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Only XmlDataDocument or empty data source is supported..

member.name: P:Origam.BI.Strings.ParametersDontMatch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Parameters don't match..

member.name: P:Origam.BI.Strings.PathNotOnReportPath
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The report path is not on the reports path specified in Origam settings..
